APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. THOMAS HESKETH, ESQ. APPEARING ON BEHALF OF SUSAN CALDWELL, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANTS. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE AND GRANTS DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1332(C)(3) AND CRC 3.1332(D). THE TRIAL DATE OF 5/6/19 IS CONTINUED TO 9/9/19 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
